DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF NATALIE K. MUTZS FURTHER RESPONSES TO DEFENDANTS UNUM GROUP AND THE PAUL REVERE LIFE INSURANCE COMPANYS REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS, SET ONE REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $4,920 IS CONTINUED FROM SEP-21-2016 TO OCT-05-2016, AT 9:00 AM, IN DEPT. 302, TO GIVE PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7B. PLAINTIFF MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 21, 2016 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE GRANTED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.
